insight: As you begin your learning journey, remember that every great accomplishment starts with a single step, and by completing your first session, you'll not only gain valuable knowledge but also establish a foundation for building a consistent study routine. By focusing on making progress one session at a time, you can quickly turn your 0-day streak into a momentum-building habit, and start seeing improvements in your scores and overall understanding of the material.

recommendation.msg: Schedule a review session before proceeding to new material.
